overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, and ascends stairs while surrounded by holographic advertisements, elevated highways, and cyberpunk architecture with vibrant pink, blue, and green neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in dark clothing along the sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego along the sidewalk, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with yellow structural elements spanning across the street
illuminated sign with 'Titan' text in pink neon on building facade
round concrete planter with palm tree and vegetation
safety railing with orange and yellow stripes along the street edge
tall digital advertisement display showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure in a futuristic cyberpunk district. Neon signs including a prominent 'Titan' sign illuminate the scene with pink and green hues. The character follows another pedestrian past a circular concrete planter with palm trees, while vehicles pass on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: character steps off sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk with bold yellow stripes

agents.ego_description: crossing the street via the marked crosswalk while vehicles pass nearby

entered.detail: road surface with thick yellow parallel stripes marking pedestrian crossing
tall black street lamp with illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a street intersection marked with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. Moving from the sheltered walkway into the open street, the perspective shifts as the elevated highway structure moves to the left. The neon 'Titan' sign becomes more prominent on the left as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various storefronts and digital displays

notable_agents.action: person standing near storefront, looking at display

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'Kiroshi' advertisement with animated graphics
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
metal roll-down shutters on commercial buildings with graffiti markings
illuminated kiosk with rotating holographic product display

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with metal railings, the character passes holographic advertisements including a prominent 'Kiroshi' billboard. The street features closed storefronts with metal shutters and digital vending machines emitting colorful light. The environment transitions toward a denser cluster of neon signs and towering holographic displays ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with red lighting district

events.description: character crosses street intersection illuminated by intense red neon lights from surrounding buildings
character enters darker area beneath overpass structure with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around parked vehicles and following the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white van parked at the curb with headlights on, partially blocking the view

entered.detail: building entrance with bright red neon strip lights and illuminated canopy
white commercial van parked along the street with front headlights illuminated
elevated walkway connecting buildings with stairs and metal railings
low concrete wall with metal railings along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant intersection dominated by intense red neon lighting from storefront awnings. After crossing the street past a parked white van, the character moves beneath a dark overpass structure where the lighting shifts to darker tones with green traffic signals visible. An overhead pedestrian bridge becomes prominent on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass area with stairway to upper level

events.description: character stops at crosswalk and waits for pedestrian traffic signal to turn green
character ascends concrete stairs leading to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for the signal, then climbing the concrete stairs to an elevated walkway

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with illuminated green walk symbol for pedestrians
wide concrete staircase with yellow edges leading upward to pedestrian bridge
silver metal handrail along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: In a darker area beneath the highway overpass, the character stops at a crosswalk and waits for the pedestrian signal to turn green. The surroundings feature concrete barriers and dim lighting with distant neon glow. The character then ascends a wide concrete staircase with metal handrails, moving toward an elevated pedestrian walkway with the city skyline visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district that transitions from sheltered sidewalks to a towering urban overpass. It begins beneath an elevated highway where pink and green neon signs illuminate a covered walkway and palm trees, before the camera moves out into the open to cross a street marked by bold yellow stripes. As the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, the scene shifts past holographic Kiroshi billboards and digital vending machines toward a denser cluster of vibrant red storefront awnings. The perspective then glides past a parked white van and beneath a dark overpass where the lighting dims and green traffic signals emerge. Finally, after a brief pause at a concrete barrier, the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase toward an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking the city skyline.
